title: School Outreach — Reyes Elementary Follow-Up
description: Follow up with Reyes Elementary and begin formal conversations with additional El Paso elementary and middle schools about launching a CodeCore Chapter.

title: Officer Recruitment Opens
description: Open applications for Chapter Officer roles (Outreach, Curriculum, Operations, Communications). No CS background required — all officers will be trained by the program.

title: Officer Selection & Onboarding
description: Select officers across key roles and begin internal training sessions. Officers learn program structure, curriculum basics, and school outreach strategies.

title: Curriculum & Materials Prep
description: Finalize lesson plans for the grades 3–5 and 6–8 tracks. Prepare activity cards, volunteer guides, and parent information sheets.

title: School Partnership Agreements
description: Finalize partnership agreements with confirmed schools. Lock in weekly time slots and assign UTEP volunteers to each chapter.

title: Faculty Onboarding Sessions
description: 6-hour onboarding session for each school's designated faculty point-of-contact. Covers how to lead sessions, manage logistics, and support students.

title: First Chapter Launch
description: First CodeCore Chapter sessions begin. UTEP volunteers present for the first two weeks, then once a month. School instructor leads every session.

title: End-of-Semester Hackathon
description: Hackathon hosted at each chapter school. Students present projects, prizes awarded, and winners published by name and school to celebrate their achievements.
